Uses of Package
com.societegenerale.failover.core

Packages that use com.societegenerale.failover.core
Package
Description
com.societegenerale.failover.configuration
Spring Boot auto-configuration for the failover framework.
com.societegenerale.failover.core
Central failover handler and execution abstractions.
com.societegenerale.failover.execution.resilience
Resilience4j integration for failover method execution.
  • Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.core used by com.societegenerale.failover.configuration
    Class
    Description
    FailoverExecution
    Strategy for executing a method call with failover semantics.
    FailoverHandler
    Core handler for failover lifecycle operations: storing payloads, recovering them on failure, and cleaning up expired entries.
  • Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.core used by com.societegenerale.failover.core
    Class
    Description
    FailoverExecution
    Strategy for executing a method call with failover semantics.
    FailoverHandler
    Core handler for failover lifecycle operations: storing payloads, recovering them on failure, and cleaning up expired entries.
  • Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.core used by com.societegenerale.failover.execution.resilience
    Class
    Description
    BasicFailoverExecution
    Basic FailoverExecution that invokes the supplier, stores the result on success, and attempts recovery via the FailoverHandler on any exception.
    FailoverExecution
    Strategy for executing a method call with failover semantics.
    FailoverHandler
    Core handler for failover lifecycle operations: storing payloads, recovering them on failure, and cleaning up expired entries.
